title: Aehr Test Systems Sales Growth Expected But A Show-Me Story
text: An analyst downgraded Aehr Test Systems to Hold following a 292% rally, with shares reaching near fair value. While sales growth is expected as the company executes on significant orders, the analyst views the stock as a show-me story given execution risks and valuation concerns. The company's 608x forward earnings multiple reflects highly elevated expectations. The recent $41 million contract win from a hyperscaler and $50.9 million effective backlog provide visibility, but the analyst suggests waiting for better entry points. The company's transition from near-term losses to profitability in fiscal 2027 is priced into current valuations, leaving limited margin of safety.
